property_description: Allows the caster to act as a resurrection point for 60 minutes.
property_limitations: Every rez must be logged with either the marshal station or the field marshal *before* the character can return to play.

property_description: Allows the caster to act as a teleportation point for anyone attempting to teleport to their location.
property_limitations: Players cannot use this as a rez point.

property_description: Tells the caster the target's name, current heritage, HP, and essence count
property_limitations: Must have the target physically present

property_description: Tells the caster the target's name, current heritage, if they've ever changed heritage, HP, Essence count, the items and boons they are bound to, level, and what professions they have (if any).
property_limitations: Must have the target physically present

property_description: Tells the caster everything on the target's character screen, as well as if the character has ever changed heritages.
property_limitations: Must have the target physically present

property_description: Allows the caster to bind an object or creature to a person's soul.
property_limitations: A person may only bind to something if they have available the required amount of free bind slots

property_description: Unbinds from curses and boons T3 and Below
property_limitations: May only unbind from 1 curse or boon at a time

property_description: Unbinds from curses and boons T4 and stronger
property_limitations: May only unbind from 1 curse or boon at a time. Will not unbind one from boons/curses/items T3 or weaker

property_description: Unbinds from all curses/items/boons a character is currently bound to.
property_limitations: All or nothing. A botch still unbinds the target from everything, but reduces their total bind slots by half for one life.

property_description: Caster learns the names of all those who had at some point been bound to the item, no matter the duration of said binding.
property_limitations: Only the caster learns the information. Caster may lie to those who ask.

property_description: Caster learns the name of who crafted the item and the location of its crafting.
property_limitations: Only the caster learns the information. Caster may lie to those who ask.

property_description: Caster learns the name of the current owner of the item if the said owner is currently bound to the item.
property_limitations: Only the caster learns the information. Caster may lie to those who ask.

property_description: The caster may view a specific location, in real time, that they have physically visited before attempting this ritual. Upon successful completion, they will receive basic visual information regarding the specified location.
property_limitations: The area must be a place the caster has physically been to before.

property_description: The caster may view a specific location, in real time, provided they have an item that originates from the specified location. Upon successful completion, they will receive basic visual information regarding the specified location.
property_limitations: The area can be anywhere as long as a secondary component is provided that originates from the area in question

property_description: The caster may view a specific person, in real time, that they have physically encountered prior to this ritual. Upon successful completion, they will receive basic visual information regarding the specified individual and their whereabouts.
property_limitations: Caster must have encountered said individual in person at least once before. Caster must know and provide the true name of the person they are attempting to scry upon.

property_description: The caster may view any specific person, in real time, as long as they provide the rare component that matches with the subject's heritage. Upon successful completion, they will receive basic visual information regarding the the specified individual and their whereabouts.
property_limitations: Subject can be anyone as long as an appropriate racial rare is provided

property_description: The caster may view a specific location, in real time, provided they have an item that originates from the specified location. Upon successful completion, they will receive basic visual information regarding the specified location, basic audio information (eavesdropping), as well as the true names of all sapient creatures within the targeted area.
property_limitations: The area can be anywhere as long as a secondary component is provided that originates from the area in question

property_description: The caster summons a spirit at a specific location upon which they would be able to scry. That spirit is able to move about unseen, able to move through physical barriers, but may not physically interact with anything. They see and hear everything going on as if they were physically present.
property_limitations: The spirit spy will communicate their information to the caster, but is potentially an unreliable narrator. The more success the caster rolls, the more likely the spirit is to keep to the reality of the experience when relating information.

property_description: The caster projects their own spirit to a specified location. The caster is able to move about unseen, able to move through physical barriers, but may not physically interact with anything. They see and hear everything going on as if they were physically present.
property_limitations: Caster is unable to interact with anything they are observing.

property_description: This ritual will never "fail". The number of successes rolled determine the outcome of the ritual. 0 successes: Caster and all subjects leave half of their bodies behind (go rez). 1 success: They are ported to a random extra planar location. 2 successes: random location within Daear. 3+ successes:  correct location.
property_limitations: No more than 2 players may be teleported at any given time.

property_description: The caster is able to transmute common materials into other common materials given they have all the necessary reagents.
property_limitations: Materials being transmuted are consumed in addition to the normal ritual cost.

property_description: The caster is able to transmute rare materials into other rare materials given they have all the necessary reagents.
property_limitations: Materials being transmuted are consumed in addition to the normal ritual cost.

property_description: The caster is able to transmute common materials into rare materials given they have all the necessary reagents.
property_limitations: Materials being transmuted are consumed in addition to the normal ritual cost.

property_description: The caster is able to transmute common materials into rare materials given they have all the necessary reagents.
property_limitations: Materials being transmuted are consumed in addition to the normal ritual cost.

property_description: 250 damage to everything not touching the caster in Radius. If botched, caster loses a life. Minimum 300s count to trigger, interrupted by damage.
property_limitations: Interrupted by damage. Caster must roleplay the ritual for the full 300 seconds. Type of elemental damage must be chosen when the ritual is rolled.

property_description: Harms everyone in Radius equal to their max hit points. If botched, caster loses a life force. Minimum 300s count to trigger, interrupted by damage
property_limitations: Interrupted by damage. Caster must roleplay the ritual for the full 300 seconds.

property_description: Heals everyone in Radius to full. If botched, caster loses a life force. Minimum 300s count to trigger, interrupted by damage.
property_limitations: Interrupted by damage. Caster must roleplay the ritual for the full 300 seconds.

property_description: Caster is able to cause one person to consider the caster their friend for 300 seconds.
property_limitations: The subject keeps all their faculties, they just feel a strong friendship towards the caster and will be more likely to support the caster and their ideas.

property_description: Caster is able influence one person for 300 seconds. The subject regards the caster like their personal leader and will do whatever they are told, within reason. The subjects will not kill themselves and will not act completely outside their personality and moral code. For example, if you want to steal something, target a thief, not a paladin.
property_limitations: The subject will not kill themselves and will not act completely outside their personality or moral code.

property_description: Caster is able to cause up to 5 people to consider the caster their friend for 300 seconds.
property_limitations: The subjects keep all their faculties, they just feel a strong friendship towards the caster and will be more likely to support the caster and their ideas.

property_description: The subjects will not kill themselves and will not act completely outside their personality and moral code. For example, if you want to steal something, target a thief, not a paladin. Botch causes caster to become paralyzed for 300. Enhance does Double Radius, and causes caster to drop to dead.
property_limitations: The subjects will not kill themselves and will not act completely outside their personality and moral code.

property_description: Concentration: Caster enters a stance in which they are able counter any spell within reach for up to 300s. If the caster fails, they are Silenced for the duration.
property_limitations: The caster may only concentrate on one spell at a time. Self cast only. Damage taken by the caster will interrupt the effect. The caster is unable to cast any spell or engage in combat for the duration of the ritual, otherwise the effect will be interrupted.

property_description: Any spell that comes within reach of the caster is automatically countered. Any player/monster standing within radius of the caster is unable to cast spells. The caster takes 100 arcane when their concentration is broken or the ritual ends.
property_limitations: The caster may only concentrate on one spell at a time. Self cast only. Damage taken by the caster will interrupt the effect. The caster is unable to cast any spell or engage in combat for the duration of the ritual, otherwise the effect will be interrupted.

property_description: Concentration: Caster becomes a teleportation conduit for 300 seconds. Willing creatures who touch the caster can one-way teleport to a specific location the caster the caster has the ability to scry upon.
property_limitations: Damage will end the effect. Caster cannot teleport themselves using this ritual. Caster must have a secondary reagent that originates from the location they are teleporting people to. If not, they may only teleport people to a location they can physically see. Damage taken by the caster will interrupt the effect. The caster is unable to cast any spell or engage in combat for the duration of the ritual, otherwise the effect will be interrupted.

property_description: The caster and targets immediately teleport to the Waystone address of the caster's choice. On failure, all targets arrive with their health reduced to 1, and the caster dies..
property_limitations: Mass Teleport only targets creatures that are physically touching the caster. The caster must complete a five second "Mass Teleport" count before all targets teleport out on a three count.

property_description: Insubstantial is per the rulebook. May end insubstantial on a 3 second "Returning" count, which ends the effect.
property_limitations: Player cannot use abilities or make attacks for the duration. May not pass through Enchanted Barriers that you do not know the passphrase for.

property_description: Insubstantial is per the rulebook. May end insubstantial on a 3 second "Returning" count, which ends the effect.
property_limitations: Player cannot use abilities or make attacks for the duration. May not pass through Enchanted Barriers that you do not know the passphrase for.

property_description: Insubstantial is per the rulebook. May end insubstantial on a 3 second "Returning" count, which ends the effect.
property_limitations: Player cannot use abilities or make attacks for the duration. May not pass through Enchanted Barriers that you do not know the passphrase for.

property_description: On success, an item that has been magically locked will be unlocked.
property_limitations: Locked item must be physically present at time of ritual.

property_description: This ritual allows the caster to increase a player's life force (their own or another's) by 1 unit.
property_limitations: Total life force cannot exceed 5 units.

property_description: This ritual allows the caster to decrease a player's life force (their own or another's) by 1 unit. Upon successful completion, the target must sign the rez log. Upon botch, the catster must sign the rez log.
property_limitations: May not take lives if it would leave the target with fewer than 1 life remaining

property_description: This ritual allows the caster to increase a player's life force (their own or another's) by 1 unit.
property_limitations: Total life force cannot exceed 5 units.

property_description: See effect- Player may choose not to accept the heritage change and choose to be obliterated instead, losing one essence and resurrecting per normal.
property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_description: See effect- Player may choose not to accept the heritage change and choose to be obliterated instead, losing one essence and resurrecting per normal.
property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_description: See effect- Player may choose not to accept the heritage change and choose to be obliterated instead, losing one essence and resurrecting per normal.
property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_description: See effect- Player may choose not to accept the heritage change and choose to be obliterated instead, losing one essence and resurrecting per normal.
property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_description: See effect- Player may choose not to accept the heritage change and choose to be obliterated instead, losing one essence and resurrecting per normal.
property_limitations: Converting player(s) must have heritage-appropriate costuming on hand.

property_description: Creates a passphase for a given Lodestone

May be applied to any type of Mystic Barrier. Only two temp passphrases may be active on any standard MB for a total of 3 usable passphrases. An XL MB may have four temp passphrases, for a total of 5 usable passphrases.
property_limitations: Passphrase only lasts one event. Ritual will consume a passphrase slot. If no passphrase slots are available, the ritual will fail

property_description: Removes a single active pass phrase from a Lodestone

A Basic Lodestone lasts 2 events, a passphrase and teleportation address must be chosen upon creation or else ritual will fail. Must have an IP item at least 6"x6"x6" to physrep the Lodestone. The item number for the Lodestone must be inscribed upon this item.
property_limitations: Basic Lodestone lasts 2 events before expiring. Lodestones act as a personal waystone and are able to teleport users with the passphrase to the location set at time of ritual. Requires a passphrase to operate. If the Lodestone is moved by its bound user, it cannot be reactivated for one week.

property_description: A passphrase and teleportation address must be chosen upon creation or else ritual will fail. Must have an IP item at least 6"x6"x6" to physrep the Lodestone. The item number for the Lodestone must be inscribed upon this item.
property_limitations: Create a permanent Lodestone. Lodestones act as a personal waystone and are able to teleport users with the passphrase to the location set at time of ritual. Requires a passphrase to operate. If the Lodestone is moved by its bound user, it cannot be reactivated for one week.

property_description: A passphrase and two teleportation addresses must be chosen upon creation or else ritual will fail. Must have an IP item at least 6"x6"x6" to physrep the Lodestone. The item number for the Lodestone must be inscribed upon this item.
property_limitations: Create a permanent Lodestone. Lodestones act as a personal waystone and are able to teleport users with the passphrase to the location set at time of ritual. Requires a passphrase to operate. If the Lodestone is moved by its bound user, it cannot be reactivated for one week.
